q: How do I use the espresso machine
a: Fill the water reservoir before brewing. The super-automatic espresso machine is on the counter — just add beans and press your drink selection. Fill the water reservoir before brewing.

q: How does the Margaritaville machine work
a: Add ice to the ice reservoir, add your mixer to the blending jar, and press the blend button. Makes perfect frozen drinks!

q: How do I use the arcade games
a: The arcade games and air hockey table are in the game room upstairs. They should be ready to play — if any have power issues, check that they are plugged in at the back.

q: How do I use the massage chair
a: The zero-gravity massage chair is in the living area. Use the remote to select a program. Recline with the footrest lever on the side.
The washer and dryer are in the laundry room. Detergent is provided. Please keep loads reasonably sized and wash pool towels separately from white linens.
Dishwasher detergent is under the kitchen sink.

q: How do I turn on the AC
a: Use the thermostat on the wall. Keep all windows and doors closed — if left open for more than a few minutes, the AC system will turn off until they are closed.

q: Can I rent a golf cart
a: Yes — Salty Rentals is walking distance from the home. Call 386-410-5558 to reserve.

q: How do I get to the beach
